title: Colored Enchantment Levels
description: A color for each enchantment level in Minecraft
body:
# Colored Enchantment Level
### About?
Just a bit of color for the boring enchantment description.
##
### What exactly changed?
- Every enchantment level in Minecraft has a color now:
1) Blue
2) Green
3) Yellow
4) Red
5) Purple
- Enchantments without level are colored now (infinity, flame, mending, etc.)
  
![levels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/847c21d5e13c8119307e45b8353dcc8029db1b7b.png)
## 
### General questions
**[1] Can I use it for my projects?:** sure, just give credit if it is public.

**[2] Why don't work in older versions?:** I think it should work, please tell me if it doesn't.

**[3] Any mod support?:** None, for now at least (you can request it).
## 
### Contact
Bug reports, tips, requests, or anything else: almostdelled@gmail.com
## 
### You may also like
I have made other resource packs with the objective of maintaining the Minecraft feeling while changing things up. Check them out!

- [Almost Vanilla Armors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-armors)

- [Almost Vanilla Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-tools)
